scripts.render: pnpm run render:zh && pnpm run render:en
scripts.render:zh: remotion render src/index.ts AhaDiffTutorialZh output/ahadiff-tutorial.zh.clean.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 24 --pixel-format yuv420p
scripts.render:en: remotion render src/index.ts AhaDiffTutorialEn output/ahadiff-tutorial.en.clean.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 24 --pixel-format yuv420p
